title: Opening for Hotel Manager at Zostel

jsonLd.title: Opening for Hotel Manager at Zostel
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, Zostel in Srinagar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Zostel:
Zostel is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Event Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zostel!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
